title: Can't get write_firrtl output for design than contains memory.

features.name: unpacked reg array used as inferred memory
features.description: Code should include an unpacked reg array declaration representing an inferred RAM, where a multi-element array is used with indexed assignment inside a clocked always block

features.name: synchronous memory write with write enable
features.description: Code should include a clocked always block where a memory array is written conditionally using a write-enable signal, representing a synchronous RAM write port
features.snippet:
always @ (posedge clk)
begin
  if (we_a)
  begin
    ram[addr_a] <= data_a;
  end
end

features.name: overlapping assignments in clocked always block
features.description: Code should include a clocked always block with a conditional branch that assigns to a register, followed by an unconditional assignment to the same register that overrides the conditional value in the same time step
